- title: string (the question text, e.g. "Do you like pizza?")

content.text: The upload code in `handlePickImage` is actually correct — it uses XHR, doesn't set Content-Type manually, uses `result.assets[0]`, and checks `!result.canceled`. The one real bug is that `type` is hardcoded to `'image/jpeg'` and `name` to `'photo.jpg'` regardless of what the picker returns. On Android, `content://` URIs often return non-JPEG files, and the wrong MIME type can cause the server to reject the upload. I'll fix that, and also add the debug `Alert` for the server response as requested.

Only warnings (pre-existing), no errors. The fix is done — two changes were made to `handlePickImage`:

1. **Dynamic MIME type and filename** — now uses `asset.mimeType` and `asset.fileName` from the picker result (falling back to `'image/jpeg'`/`'photo.jpg'`), so Android `content://` URIs with non-JPEG files are handled correctly.
2. **Debug logging + Alert on failure** — `xhr.onload` now logs `status` and `responseText` every time, shows an `Alert` with the raw server response on non-2xx, and wraps `JSON.parse` in a try/catch to surface malformed responses instead of crashing silently.Try uploading again. If it still fails, the Alert will now show the exact server error message — let me know what it says and I'll fix it immediately.Try uploading again. If it still fails, the Alert will now show the exact server error message — let me know what it says and I'll fix it immediately.

content.message: feat: Show exact server error in upload alert

Please try uploading a photo again — if it still fails, share the error message that appears in the Alert so I can see exactly what the server is returning.The backend is live. Please try uploading a photo again — if it still fails, share the error message that appears in the Alert so I can see exactly what the server is returning.

All done. Here's what was built:

- **New "Folders" tab** added between Results and Admin in both `_layout.tsx` and `_layout.ios.tsx` (SF Symbol `folder.fill`)
- **Collections list screen** (`app/(tabs)/collections/index.tsx`) — large emoji cards with color accents, skeleton loading, pull-to-refresh, empty state
- **Collection detail screen** (`app/collection-detail.tsx`) — colored banner, combined results bar chart via `DonutChart`, downloadable chart, individual poll mini-cards
- **Collection edit screen** (`app/collection-edit.tsx`) — live preview banner, emoji input, 6-color swatch picker with checkmarks, create/edit/delete
- **Poll edit updated** — new "Folder" section with a bottom-sheet modal picker showing all collections; `collection_id` included in save body
- **Admin screen updated** — fetches collections in parallel with polls via `Promise.all`, shows colored folder badge (emoji + name) on each poll card that belongs to a collection(assistant tool call)Here's what was built:

- **Folders tab** — a new tab where you create named folders with an emoji and color
- **Folder detail** — shows all polls in the folder plus a **combined results chart** that aggregates votes across all polls
- **Poll edit** — a "Folder" picker so you can assign any poll to a folder
- **Admin list** — each poll card shows a colored folder badge if it belongs to one

Two sample folders are pre-seeded: "Food Preferences 🍕" (pizza + ice cream polls) and "Animals 🐾" (dogs poll).Here's what was built:

## 1. `app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx` (50 lines)

```tsx
import React from 'react';
import { Stack } from 'expo-router';
import FloatingTabBar from '@/components/FloatingTabBar';
import { View } from 'react-native';

const TABS = [
  { name: '(home)', route: '/(tabs)/(home)' as const, icon: 'thumb-up' as const, label: 'Vote' },
  { name: 'results', route: '/(tabs)/results' as const, icon: 'bar-chart' as const, label: 'Results' },
  { name: 'collections', route: '/(tabs)/collections' as const, icon: 'folder' as const, label: 'Folders' },
  { name: 'admin', route: '/(tabs)/admin' as const, icon: 'settings' as const, label: 'Admin' },
];

export default function TabLayout() {
  return (
    <View style={{ flex: 1 }}>
      <Stack screenOptions={{ headerShown: false, animation: 'none' }}>
        <Stack.Screen name="(home)" />
        <Stack.Screen name="results" />
        <Stack.Screen name="collections" />
        <Stack.Screen name="admin" />
      </Stack>
      <FloatingTabBar tabs={TABS} containerWidth={340} />
    </View>
  );
}
```

```tsx
import React from 'react';
import { NativeTabs, Icon, Label } from 'expo-router/unstable-native-tabs';

export default function TabLayout() {
  return (
    <NativeTabs>
      <NativeTabs.Trigger name="(home)">
        <Icon sf="hand.thumbsup.fill" />
        <Label>Vote</Label>
      </NativeTabs.Trigger>
      <NativeTabs.Trigger name="results">
        <Icon sf="chart.bar.fill" />
        <Label>Results</Label>
      </NativeTabs.Trigger>
      <NativeTabs.Trigger name="collections">
        <Icon sf="folder.fill" />
        <Label>Folders</Label>
      </NativeTabs.Trigger>
      <NativeTabs.Trigger name="admin">
        <Icon sf="gearshape.fill" />
        <Label>Admin</Label>
      </NativeTabs.Trigger>
    </NativeTabs>
  );
}
```

- `CombinedResults` — `{ total_votes, total_polls, by_option, polls_summary }`
- `CollectionDetail` — `{ id, name, description, color, emoji, poll_count, created_at, updated_at, polls, combined_results }`

**Sub-components:**
- `MiniPollBar` — animated dual-bar showing A vs B vote split
- `PollMiniCard` — animated card with emoji, title, mini bar, vote count; tappable → navigates to `/poll-edit`

**Main screen (`CollectionDetailScreen`):**

## 5. `app/poll-edit.tsx` (1227 lines)

**Imports:** React, RN core, expo-router, safe-area, `expo-image`, lucide icons, `ResultsModal`, `PollWithCounts` type, `expo-image-picker`, `DonutChart`.

**Types:** `Collection`, `PollForm`, `Counts`

**Sub-components:**

- `FormField` — labeled `TextInput` with focus border
- `CompactResultBar` — animated horizontal bar per option (emoji, label, animated fill, pct%, count)
- `OptionRow` — emoji input + label input + optional remove button (used for A/B/C/D)

**Main screen (`PollEditScreen`):**
- Dual mode: create or edit
- Fetches `GET /api/collections` (for folder picker) and `GET /api/polls/:id` (when editing)
- **Results Summary card** (edit mode, when counts exist): `CompactResultBar` per option + `DonutChart` + "Download Chart" (opens `ResultsModal`) + "Reset votes" buttons
- **Poll Question card:** title, description, image picker (photo library via `expo-image-picker` + XHR upload to `/api/upload`), optional manual URL input
- **Answer Options card:** always shows A + B; optional C and D via "+ Add option"; each uses `OptionRow`
- **Folder card:** opens `Modal` sheet with `FlatList` of collections to pick from
- **Active toggle:** `Switch` for `is_active`
- Save → `POST /api/polls` or `PUT /api/polls/:id`
- Delete → `DELETE /api/polls/:id` (with Alert confirmation)
- Reset votes → `POST /api/polls/:id/reset` (with Alert confirmation)
- `ResultsModal` rendered at bottom for chart download
- All user actions and network requests have `console.log`

## 1. `app/(tabs)/admin/index.tsx` (571 lines)

**Imports:** React, RN core components, `useSafeAreaInsets`, `useFocusEffect`/`useRouter` from expo-router, Lucide icons (`Plus`, `Pencil`, `CheckCircle`, `Download`), `ResultsModal`, `PollWithCounts` type.

**Constants:**
- `BASE_URL = 'https://at52tm8me4yfm63sgxb9tx3u2csxcjqs.app.specular.dev'`
- `COLORS` object (background, surface, purple, coral, blue, green, yellow, text, border, etc.)

**Types:** `Poll` (id, title, description, option_a/b_label/emoji, is_active, created_at, updated_at, collection_id, counts), `Collection` (id, name, color, emoji)

**Sub-components:**
- `MiniBarChart({ countA, countB, total })` — animated horizontal bar using `Animated.Value` flex widths, shows vote totals
- `PollCard({ poll, index, collection, onPress, onDownloadPress })` — animated card with entrance animation, press scale, emoji pair, title, active badge, collection badge, mini bar chart, download + edit buttons

**Main component `AdminScreen`:**
- State: `polls`, `collections`, `loading`, `refreshing`, `error`, `modalPoll`, `fetchingPollId`, `contentOpacity`
- `fetchPolls`: parallel fetch of `/api/polls` + `/api/collections`; if counts not in list response, fetches each poll individually
- `useFocusEffect`: refreshes on screen focus
- `handleRefresh`: pull-to-refresh
- `handleCreatePoll`: navigates to `/poll-edit`
- `handleEditPoll(id)`: navigates to `/poll-edit?id=...`
- `handleDownloadPress(poll)`: fetches full poll data, opens `ResultsModal`
- Renders: header with stats row (total polls, active count), list of `PollCard`s with loading overlay, `ResultsModal`

---

## 2. `app/(tabs)/admin/_layout.tsx` (19 lines)

Simple `Stack` layout with `headerShown: false` for the `index` screen. All screens have `headerTransparent`, no shadow, no large title, minimal back button.

```tsx
import { Stack } from 'expo-router';

export default function AdminLayout() {
  return (
    <Stack screenOptions={{ headerTransparent: true, headerShadowVisible: false, ... }}>
      <Stack.Screen name="index" options={{ title: 'Admin', headerShown: false }} />
    </Stack>
  );
}
```

---

## 3. `app/(tabs)/collections/index.tsx` (336 lines)

**Imports:** React, RN core, `useSafeAreaInsets`, `useFocusEffect`/`useRouter`, Lucide `Plus`/`Folder`.

**Constants:** `BASE_URL` (same), `COLORS` (background `#FAF8FF`, purple, text, border, etc.)

**Type:** `Collection` (id, name, description, color, emoji, poll_count, created_at, updated_at)

**Sub-components:**
- `CollectionCard({ collection, index, onPress })` — animated entrance + press scale, shows emoji circle, name, description, poll count badge, chevron
- `SkeletonCard()` — pulsing skeleton placeholder

**Main component `CollectionsScreen`:**
- State: `collections`, `loading`, `refreshing`, `error`, `contentOpacity`
- `fetchCollections`: GET `/api/collections`
- `useFocusEffect`: refreshes on focus
- `handleRefresh`: pull-to-refresh
- `handleCreate`: navigates to `/collection-edit`
- `handleCardPress(id, name)`: navigates to `/collection-detail?id=...`
- Renders: header with `+` button, skeleton cards while loading, empty state with create CTA, or list of `CollectionCard`s

---

## 4. `app/(tabs)/(home)/index.tsx` (429 lines) — cross-platform

**Imports:** React, RN core + `Platform`, `expo-image`, `useSafeAreaInsets`. No static Haptics import — uses `require('expo-haptics')` conditionally inside `handleVote` only on iOS.

**Types:** `Poll`, `PollWithCounts` (adds `counts: {a,b,c,d,total}`), `VoteChoice = 'a'|'b'|'c'|'d'`, `PollOption`

**Helpers:** `resolveImageSource`, `buildOptions` (builds 2–4 options from poll fields)

**Main component `VoteScreen`:**
- State: `poll`, `loading`, `error`, `voted`, `voting`
- Animated refs: `celebrationScale`, `celebrationOpacity`, `chosenEmojiScale`, `buttonScales` (per-option), `contentOpacity`
- `fetchActivePoll`: GET `/api/polls/active`, handles 404 as "no poll" gracefully
- `handleVote(choice)`: haptics (iOS only via `require`), button bounce animation, POST `/api/polls/{id}/votes`, celebration overlay for 2.2s then resets
- Layout logic: 2 options = single row, 3 = row + solo, 4 = 2×2 grid
- Renders: header label, optional image, title, description, vote button grid, celebration overlay

---

## 5. `app/(tabs)/(home)/index.ios.tsx` (420 lines) — iOS-specific

Nearly identical to `index.tsx` with these differences:
- **Static Haptics import**: `import * as Haptics from 'expo-haptics'` (no `require`, no `Platform` check)
- **`handleVote`**: calls `await Haptics.impactAsync(Haptics.ImpactFeedbackStyle.Heavy)` directly
- **Image placement**: image appears *after* title+description (not before), with `borderRadius: 24` + `overflow: 'hidden'` on the wrapper; falls back to `<View style={{ height: 16 }} />` when no image
- **Title font size**: `34` / `fontWeight: '900'` / `lineHeight: 42` (vs `30`/`800`/`38` in base)
- **ScrollView**: `paddingHorizontal: 20` is on the `contentContainerStyle` directly (not on the inner vote buttons `View`)
- No `titleMarginTop` variable (image is after title, so not needed)Now I have a clear picture. Let me understand the request:

2. **Put polls and diagrams and poll results in admin** — the admin screen should show polls with their result diagrams inline
3. **Fix bugs**
